Title: A Synthetic Facultative CAM-Like Shuttle in C3 Rice Plants

Common_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: Aluminium-activated malate transporter family; vacuolar anion channel
Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Nighttime malate storage for CAM-like carbon sequestration and daytime decarboxylation support
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes vacuolar malate storage and contributes to nighttime malate accumulation in engineered rice
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. AtALMT9 was introduced as the malate transporter module in the synthetic CAM bypass. 2. Transient expression in rice protoplasts localized AtALMT9 to the vacuolar membrane. 3. In CBP plants, nighttime malate accumulation and reduced vacuolar pH support its role in vacuolar malate sequestration.
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Transgene stacking; transient GFP localization in rice protoplasts; PCR/RT-PCR/immunoblot confirmation in CBP lines; metabolite profiling; vacuolar pH assay
Common_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Transgene expressed in rice leaves in CBP lines
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Day/night cycle; nighttime sampling at 12:00 am and daytime sampling at 12:00 pm
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful transporter module for CAM engineering or malate-storage engineering in C3 crops; likely should be combined with carboxylation/decarboxylation and stomatal modules
Common_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: In the full CBP context, increased stomatal conductance, lower intrinsic water use efficiency, and poorer drought performance were observed; transporter-specific tradeoff not isolated
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Function tested as part of a multigene synthetic pathway rather than singly; supports malate sequestration but daytime malate remobilization mechanism remains incomplete in the design.

Common_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: SLAC/SLAH anion channel family; stomatal regulation protein
Common_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Supports CAM-like carbon sequestration context by modulating stomatal behavior rather than directly synthesizing malate
Common_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Loss of OsSLAC1 created the receptor background for the CBP system and increased stomatal conductance/photosynthetic context, but did not improve water-use efficiency or drought resistance
Common_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. OsSLAC1 was knocked out by CRISPR-Cas9 to form the stomatal regulation module background. 2. slac1 mutants showed normal growth under normal conditions. 3. slac1 mutants displayed rolled leaves and rapid water loss under drought. 4. In the CBP background, higher stomatal conductance was associated with lower iWUE and poorer drought performance.
Common_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: CRISPR-Cas9 knockout; mutant phenotyping; drought treatment; gas exchange analysis
Common_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Normal growth; PEG-simulated drought; pot drought stress; dark treatment; varying Ci and light
Common_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Stomatal module can support photosynthetic enhancement in CAM-engineered rice, but constitutive loss of OsSLAC1 is unsuitable for drought-prone deployment; inducible stomatal control is recommended
Common_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Rapid water loss, rolled-leaf phenotype under drought, decreased intrinsic water use efficiency, lower survival under drought in CBP background
Common_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Used as receptor background rather than nutrient-pathway catalyst; included because it is an experimentally central core module in the synthetic CAM system affecting carbon-sequestration phenotype.

Pathway_Genes.Applied_Promoters: Native AcoCA1 promoter (circadian/dark-responsive, used in construct)
Pathway_Genes.Biosynthetic_Pathway: Synthetic facultative CAM bypass / CAM carbon fixation
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Hydrates CO2 to bicarbonate for subsequent PEPC-mediated fixation
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: CAM biomarker and temporary carbon-storage metabolite supporting daytime CO2 release and carbon sequestration
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes nocturnal bicarbonate supply and supports nighttime malate accumulation in engineered rice
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. AcoCA1 was selected from pineapple because it is highly expressed in leaves and induced by darkness/circadian rhythm. 2. In rice, AcoCA1 showed nocturnal expression with peak after 2 h darkness. 3. AcoCA1 localized to cytoplasm and chloroplast. 4. Its introduction contributed to the synthetic CAM bypass associated with nighttime malate accumulation and improved photosynthetic performance.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Database-guided candidate selection; native-promoter transgene stacking; qRT-PCR diurnal profiling; transient GFP localization; immunoblotting; metabolite profiling
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Relatively high in pineapple leaves; induced by darkness and circadian rhythm
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Nocturnal expression in rice flag leaves; highest after 2 h darkness and remains high until morning
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Key upstream CAM-engineering enzyme for installing nocturnal CO2 hydration in C3 crops; best used in multigene stacks with PEPC/MDH/transporter modules
Pathway_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: No gene-specific penalty isolated; in whole CBP plants, water-use efficiency did not improve
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: CA activity was not directly measured due to lack of assay method in this study.

Pathway_Genes.Applied_Promoters: Native AcoPEPC1 promoter (circadian/dark-responsive, used in construct)
Pathway_Genes.Biosynthetic_Pathway: Synthetic facultative CAM bypass / CAM carbon fixation
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Fixes bicarbonate onto phosphoenolpyruvate to form oxaloacetate during nocturnal CAM-like carbon fixation
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Temporary carbon storage and daytime CO2 release for enhanced carbon sequestration
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes nocturnal oxaloacetate production and supports malate accumulation and enhanced carbon fixation in CBP rice
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. AcoPEPC1 was chosen because it is highly expressed in pineapple leaves and induced by darkness/circadian rhythm. 2. In rice, AcoPEPC1 showed a higher expression pattern at night. 3. AcoPEPC1 localized to the cytoplasm. 4. PEPC activity in CBP lines was 51–61% higher than CK. 5. CBP plants accumulated more nighttime malate and showed improved photosynthetic rate and carboxylation efficiency.
Pathway_Genes.Rate_Limiting_or_Key_Control_Step: Key control step for nocturnal carboxylation in the engineered CAM bypass
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Candidate selection from pineapple expression data; native-promoter transgene stacking; transient GFP localization; qRT-PCR diurnal profiling; enzyme assay; metabolite profiling
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: High in pineapple leaves; induced by darkness and circadian rhythm
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Higher at night in rice leaves
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: High-value gene for CAM engineering in C3 crops to enhance nocturnal carbon capture; should be stacked with CA, MDH, transport, and decarboxylation modules
Pathway_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: No gene-specific penalty isolated; whole-system tradeoffs include increased respiration and reduced iWUE
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Central nocturnal fixation enzyme in the engineered module.

Pathway_Genes.Biosynthetic_Pathway: Synthetic facultative CAM bypass / CAM carbon fixation
Pathway_Genes.Pathway_Branch_or_Subpathway: Links nocturnal carboxylation and daytime decarboxylation module
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Reduces oxaloacetate to malate for vacuolar storage; also participates in daytime cytoplasmic conversion linked to decarboxylation/PEP regeneration as described by the model
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: CAM organic acid for carbon storage and remobilization
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes malate formation in engineered rice and contributes to diurnal malate accumulation
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. AcoMDH1 was selected from pineapple and incorporated into the CBP stack. 2. It localized to the cytoplasm in rice protoplasts. 3. AcoMDH1 showed higher daytime expression trend in CBP rice. 4. MDH activity was 14–30% higher in CBP lines than CK. 5. CBP plants showed increased malate accumulation at dawn/night and altered TCA-cycle flux.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Transgene stacking; transient GFP localization; qRT-PCR diurnal profiling; enzyme assay; metabolite profiling
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Higher expression trend during the day in rice
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful enzyme for building malate-production capacity in CAM-like engineering and carbon-storage shuttles
Pathway_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Whole-system increase in TCA-cycle flux and dark respiration suggests potential respiratory drain
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Paper describes dual functional placement in malate production and daytime carbon flow reconstruction.

Pathway_Genes.Biosynthetic_Pathway: Synthetic facultative CAM bypass / CAM decarboxylation
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Decarboxylates oxaloacetate to phosphoenolpyruvate and CO2 in daytime cytoplasm
Pathway_Genes.End_Product_Connection_Type: Required for storage/remobilization of target product and releases CO2 to support Calvin cycle
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Intermediate carbon-storage metabolite that is remobilized to elevate daytime CO2 around Rubisco
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Supports daytime malate-derived decarboxylation/PEP regeneration and contributes to higher photosynthetic rate and carboxylation efficiency
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. AcoPEPCK1 was selected based on high pineapple leaf expression. 2. It localized to the cytoplasm in rice protoplasts. 3. AcoPEPCK1 showed higher expression trend during the day in rice. 4. PEPCK activity was 13–32% higher in CBP lines. 5. The engineered CBP lines showed increased daytime PEP and improved photosynthetic parameters.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Transgene stacking; transient GFP localization; qRT-PCR diurnal profiling; enzyme assay; metabolite profiling; gas exchange
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Higher during the day in rice leaves
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Important daytime decarboxylation module for CAM engineering aimed at boosting internal CO2 supply to Rubisco
Pathway_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: May contribute to futile cycling or respiratory cost if not tightly regulated
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: The paper emphasizes need for stricter regulation to avoid futile cycles between carboxylation and decarboxylation.

Pathway_Genes.Biosynthetic_Pathway: Synthetic facultative CAM bypass / CAM decarboxylation and PEP regeneration
Pathway_Genes.Catalyzed_Reaction_Description: Converts pyruvate to phosphoenolpyruvate in the chloroplast to regenerate PEP during daytime CAM-like metabolism
Pathway_Genes.Terminal_Metabolite_Function: Supports carbon shuttle whose daytime decarboxylation enhances Calvin-cycle CO2 availability
Pathway_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Supports daytime PEP regeneration and contributes to enhanced daytime carbon fixation and increased PEP accumulation in CBP rice
Pathway_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. AcoPPDK1 was selected from pineapple based on high leaf expression. 2. It localized to chloroplasts in rice protoplasts. 3. AcoPPDK1 showed higher daytime expression trend in rice. 4. PPDK activity was 9–16% higher in CBP lines than CK. 5. Daytime PEP accumulation increased in CBP plants, consistent with enhanced Calvin-cycle support.
Pathway_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: Transgene stacking; transient GFP localization; qRT-PCR diurnal profiling; enzyme assay; metabolite profiling
Pathway_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Higher during the day in rice leaves
Pathway_Genes.Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu: Useful PEP-regeneration module for engineering CAM-like or carbon-concentrating shuttles in rice and other C3 crops
Pathway_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Acts in chloroplast, distinct from cytoplasmic AcoPEPCK1/AcoMDH1 branch.
